  • weekly picks (Jun 3 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 3rd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/15

    1. 2606.13721v1 Controlling Defects and Probing Dynamics in Active Nematics with Deep Reinforcement Learning (arXiv)

    2. 2606.13765v1 Electrostatic Charge Model for Dual-Layer Oxide Thin-Film Transistors (arXiv)

    3. 2606.13772v1 Digital programming of spin correlations in a fermionic lattice quantum simulator (arXiv)

    4. 2606.13805v1 Enhancement of spin current in Fe${85}$Co${15}$/Ni${80}$Fe${20}$ bilayers via interlayer ferromagnetic coupling (arXiv)

    5. 2606.13828v1 Observation of intertwined charge density wave order and superconductivity in Janus monolayer (arXiv)

    6. 2606.13830v1 A Collective-Spin Derivation of the Uniform Magnon Hamiltonian in Cavity Magnonics (arXiv)

    7. 2606.13831v1 Combining Frozen Trajectory Excitation and TACAW for in silico Time-Resolved Vibrational Electron Energy Loss/Gain Spectroscopy (arXiv)

    8. 2606.13833v1 Machine-learned dynamics of surface polarons at reduced oxide surfaces (arXiv)

    9. 2606.13869v1 DFTB coupled with NEGF study of the structural, electronic and transport properties of goldene 2D material (arXiv)

    10. 2606.13912v1 Direct/adaptive-mixture phase-gradient learning for neural-network quantum states with complex phase structure (arXiv)

    11. 2606.13972v1 Mean-field theory of myopic self-avoiding fractional Brownian motion (arXiv)

    12. 2606.14003v1 XRDiff: Crystal Structure Prediction from Powder X-Ray Diffraction Data Using Diffusion Models (arXiv)

    13. 2606.14051v1 Symmetry of the critical current function in superconducting nanodevices (arXiv)

    14. 2606.14055v1 General Theory for Ferroelectric Control of Spin Splitting in Collinear Antiferromagnets (arXiv)

    15. 2606.14075v1 Field-selective criticality in 2D melting revealed by multi-field Lee-Yang zeros (arXiv)

    16. 2606.14101v1 Altermagnetism and bond-nematicity in the spin-$1/2$ square lattice $J_1-J_2-\delta$ model (arXiv)

    17. 2606.14103v1 Interface-engineered oxidation-resistant wafer-level Tantalum-Tantalum thermocompression bonding for 3D integration of superconducting interconnects (arXiv)

    18. 2606.14118v1 Probing Structure and Ionic Transport in Molten Lithium Carbonate (arXiv)

    19. 2606.14133v1 Diffusion-driven autocatalytic dynamics on a sphere (arXiv)

    20. 2606.14183v1 The Structure-tuning Magnetism in the Co(NbxTa1-x)2O6 Series (arXiv)

    21. 2606.14196v1 Ferromagnetic Order of Reduced Magnetic Moments in a Frustrated Sawtooth Chain of the Magnetic Semiconductor ZnYb$_2$S$_4$ (arXiv)

    22. 2606.14231v1 Spin mixing induced dynamics of spinor solitons in $F=1$ Bose Einstein condensates (arXiv)

    23. 2606.14246v1 $p$-wave magnet and hedgehog-type Berry curvature in helimagnetic MnAu$_2$ (arXiv)

    24. 2606.14272v1 Pronounced in-plane anomalous Hall effect with vanishing out-of-plane response in Cr1.2Te2 (arXiv)

    25. 2606.14338v1 Mass-imbalanced two-dimensional Bose-Fermi mixtures with boson-fermion pairing (arXiv)

    26. 2606.14352v1 Modeling light-matter coupled systems with neural quantum states (arXiv)

    27. 2606.14374v1 Bond-operator analytical approach for the $t$-$J$ model (arXiv)

    28. 2606.14378v1 Multistate Manipulation of Charge-Spin Conversion in Two-Dimensional Ferroelectric Bilayers (arXiv)

    29. 2606.14424v1 Strain- and doping-tunable optical resonance in Kekul'e-Y graphene (arXiv)

    30. 2606.14425v1 SmoQyElPhQMC.jl: An open-source Julia package for efficient and scalable quantum Monte Carlo simulations of electron-phonon coupled models (arXiv)

    31. 2606.14431v1 On-chip superconducting GHz RF reflectometry of the capacitance response in bilayer graphene (arXiv)

    32. 2606.14483v1 Generic nonlocal statistics of the stationary measure in conserved active systems (arXiv)

    33. 2606.14487v1 Spin-orbit coupling by design in quantum state engineering of atomically defined quantum dots (arXiv)

    34. 2606.14519v1 Extending Covariant Fluctuation Theorems into Quantum Regime through Quasiprobability Approach (arXiv)

    35. 2606.14542v1 Boltzmann-Like Occupation of Nonequilibrium Steady States on Dense Networks (arXiv)

    36. 2606.14545v1 First-principles calculations of internal conversion processes in spin defects (arXiv)

    37. 2606.14588v1 Tailoring the properties of YBa${2}$Cu${3}$O$_{7-\delta}$ thin films by 30 keV He$^+$ irradiation: An enabling route to superconducting device nanopatterning (arXiv)

    38. 2606.14590v1 Lattice dynamics and the spectroscopic signatures of H-bond disorder in $\delta$-AlOOH (arXiv)

    39. 2606.14635v1 Open Wilson chain numerical renormalization group approach to steady-state non-equilibrium quantum transport (arXiv)

    40. 2606.14683v1 Quantum geometrical description of hole spin qubits far away from the $\Gamma$-point (arXiv)

    41. 2606.14685v1 Monolithic hybrid quantum dot devices in superconducting twisted bilayer graphene (arXiv)

    42. 2606.13750v1 Tantalum as a base material for superconducting integrated circuits (arXiv)

    43. 2606.13778v1 Resurgence of the Thermal Transition between Bounce and Sphaleron (arXiv)

    44. 2606.13792v1 RG Dynamics of Irrelevant Fermion Operators and the Drag Coupling Mechanism (arXiv)

    45. 2606.13857v1 Local correlations in long-range dual-unitary kicked Hamiltonian chains (arXiv)

    46. 2606.13890v1 Mean First Passage Time for Persistent Random Walks in Annular Search Domains (arXiv)

    48. 2606.14034v1 All about quantum error correction: distillation, mitigation, self-correction and beyond (arXiv)

    51. 2606.14174v1 Universal Construction of Generalized Lyapunov Functions for Nonlinear Dynamical Systems Using Physics-Informed Neural Networks (arXiv)

    53. 2606.14331v1 Wealth Inequality and Planetary Boundaries in a Stylized Agent-Based Model (arXiv)
